mapper.select: /* adm-system-sequence-strategy-sql-oracle.xml - getSequenceStrategy */ SELECT '0' CHK , #{apkey} AS APKEY , STGNM , SEQNM , STARTNO , PREFIX , SUFFIX , LENGTH AS SEQLENGTH , DATEFORMAT , SEQINITUSEYN , SEQRESETCYCLE , SEQINITDATE , DELYN , PREFIX || TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, DATEFORMAT) || SUFFIX || LPAD(STARTNO::TEXT, LENGTH, '0') AS SEQRESULT , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_SEQ_STG A
/* adm-system-sequence-strategy-sql-oracle.xml - getApplicationList */ SELECT APKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_AP WHERE ISOFFLINE = 'N'
